core_aesthetic: Pinterest elegance + modern marketplace + women entrepreneur ecosystem. Premium, elegant, calm, trustworthy, modern Indian. Category-defining.
tagline: India's First Platform To Empower Women Entrepreneurs With Structured Growth

rules.h1: font-serif text-5xl sm:text-6xl tracking-tight text-[#2C2A29] leading-[1.1]
rules.labels: font-sans text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.15em] font-medium text-[#6E6259]

spacing_and_layout.masonry_feed: columns-1 sm:columns-2 lg:columns-3 xl:columns-4 gap-6 space-y-6

surfaces_and_effects.cards: bg-[#FAF8F5] border border-[#EBE3DC] rounded-2xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300

animations.page_transition: framer-motion: initial opacity-0 translate-y-4, animate opacity-100 translate-y-0, duration 0.6s, ease-out
animations.image_hover: overflow-hidden -> child img: hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-700 ease-in-out

components_strategy.buttons: rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-sans font-medium transition-all duration-300
components_strategy.shadcn_overrides: Override all default Vercel-look borders with rounded-2xl, replace default gray borders with #EBE3DC, change ring focus to #DCAE96
components_strategy.data_testid_rule: Every interactive element MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button')

hero_backgrounds.description: Abstract pastel render for elegant soft section backgrounds
Soft pink blurry pattern for warm modern aesthetics

entrepreneurs_and_profiles.description: Elegant Indian woman in saree, perfect for seller profile or hero spotlight
Confident Indian woman in modern office setting for contemporary business feel

artisans_and_community.description: Woman with colorful fabrics, ideal for KED Spotlight Stories or Artisan showcase
Woman working on art/handicraft for community and learning section

products_and_marketplace.description: Minimalist aesthetic product for marketplace discovery feed
Aesthetic soap/lifestyle product held in hand for product detail pages

page_specific_instructions.homepage: Focus on the Hero Section using abstract pastel backgrounds or the elegant saree woman image. Use framer-motion for smooth scroll reveals. The 'Discovery Feed' should utilize a Pinterest-style masonry layout using 'columns-1 sm:columns-2 lg:columns-3 xl:columns-4'.
page_specific_instructions.marketplace: Grid-based product cards with soft hover elevation (`hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg`). Incorporate categorical filters horizontally with pill-shaped tabs.
page_specific_instructions.seller_profile: Use a split layout: soft background header merging into a pristine white/off-white content area. Large circular avatars with an overlapping 'Trust Badge' icon.
page_specific_instructions.spotlight_stories: Editorial, magazine-style layout. Large typography for quotes (`Cormorant Garamond italic`), asymmetrical image placements using bento grid.
